idea-plugin.description:
Send selected code to JetBrains AI Assistant — with the file name and line numbers already attached.

No more switching windows, copying code, and typing "this is from file X line Y". Select the code, press the shortcut, and start asking your question.

How to use

  1. Select any code in the editor.
  2. Press Alt+Shift+A (macOS: ⌥⇧A), or right-click → Send to AI Assistant Chat.
  3. The AI Assistant panel opens with the chat input pre-filled:
    @file:UserService.kt [lines 42 to 58]
  4. Type your question and press Enter.

The message is inserted but not sent automatically — you can review and add context before submitting.

How to change the shortcut

  1. Open Settings → Keymap.
  2. Search for Send to AI Assistant Chat.
  3. Double-click → Add Keyboard Shortcut → press your keys → OK.

Requirements

  • The JetBrains AI Assistant plugin must be installed and enabled.
  • Works in all JetBrains IDEs: IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, WebStorm, PhpStorm, GoLand, CLion, Rider, RubyMine, RustRover, DataGrip, Android Studio.

action.description: Copy selected code with file context and paste into AI Assistant
